Structs/SHA224Hash.html#/s:7KinBase10SHA.name: encodedValue
Structs/SHA224Hash.html#/s:7KinBase10SHA.abstract: UTF-8 String representation of the 29 bytes representing the first 230 bits of a SHA-256

Structs/KinBinaryMemo/TransferType.html#.name: none
Structs/KinBinaryMemo/TransferType.html#.abstract: When none of the other types are appropriate for the use case.

Structs/KinBinaryMemo/TransferType.html#.name: earn
Structs/KinBinaryMemo/TransferType.html#.abstract: Use when transferring Kin to a user for some performed action.

Structs/KinBinaryMemo/TransferType.html#.name: spend
Structs/KinBinaryMemo/TransferType.html#.abstract: Use when transferring Kin due to purchasing something.

Structs/KinBinaryMemo/TransferType.html#.name: p2p
Structs/KinBinaryMemo/TransferType.html#.abstract: Use when transferring Kin where it does not constitute an earn or spend.

Structs/KinBinaryMemo.html#/s:7KinBase0A.name: encode()
Structs/KinBinaryMemo.html#/s:7KinBase0A.abstract: Fields below are packed from LSB to MSB order:

Structs/KinAccount.html#/s:7KinBase0A7Ac.abstract: The sequence number on a registered account

Structs/KinAccount.html#/s:7KinBase0A7Ac.name: merge(_:)
Structs/KinAccount.html#/s:7KinBase0A7Ac.abstract: Merges self.key with other info on the given account

Structs/InvoiceList.html#/s:7KinBase11In.name: id
Structs/InvoiceList.html#/s:7KinBase11In.abstract: Identifier for the InvoiceList that contains a SHA-224 of the invoices data.

Structs/Invoice.html#/s:7KinBase7Invoice.name: id
Structs/Invoice.html#/s:7KinBase7Invoice.abstract: Identifier for the Invoice that contains a SHA-224 of the lineItems data.

Structs/Invoice.html#/s:7KinBase7Invoice.name: lineItems
Structs/Invoice.html#/s:7KinBase7Invoice.abstract: 1-1024 LineItems describing an itemized list of what the Invoice is for.

Structs/SKU.html#/s:7KinBase3SKUV5bytesS.name: bytes
Structs/SKU.html#/s:7KinBase3SKUV5bytesS.abstract: can by up to 128 bytes in size

Structs/KinEnvironment.html#/s:7KinBase0.name: init(network:service:storage:networkHandler:dispatchQueue:testService:logger:)
Structs/KinEnvironment.html#/s:7KinBase0.abstract: Use this initializer to specify your custom environment.

Structs/KinEnvironment.html#/s:7KinBase0.name: allAccountIds()
Structs/KinEnvironment.html#/s:7KinBase0.abstract: A convenience function to get all account ids stored in the current environment.

Structs/Invoice.html.name: Invoice
Structs/Invoice.html.abstract: Contains the information about what a given KinPayment was for.

Structs/InvoiceList.html.name: InvoiceList
Structs/InvoiceList.html.abstract: A collection of Invoices. Often submitted in the same KinTransaction together.

Structs/KinBinaryMemo.html.name: KinBinaryMemo
Structs/KinBinaryMemo.html.abstract: A memo format understood by the Agora services.

Structs.html#/s:7KinBase25GetServiceConf.name: GetServiceConfigRequestV4
Structs.html#/s:7KinBase25GetServiceConf.abstract: subsidizerAccount The public key of the account that the service will use to sign transactions for funding.

Protocols/KinPaymentWriteOperations.html.name: mergeTokenAccounts(for:appIndex:)
Protocols/KinPaymentWriteOperations.html.abstract: Merge existing Kin token accounts into the associated token account. The associated token is created if it doesn’t exist.

Protocols/KinPaymentWriteOperations.html.name: sendKinPayment(_:memo:)
Protocols/KinPaymentWriteOperations.html.abstract: Send a paymentItem to the Kin Blockchain for processing.

Protocols/KinPaymentWriteOperations.html.name: sendKinPayments(_:memo:sourceAccountSpec:destinationAccountSpec:)
Protocols/KinPaymentWriteOperations.html.abstract: Sends a batch of payments, each corresponding to KinPaymentItem in a single KinTransaction to be processed together.

Protocols/KinPaymentReadOperations.html#.name: observePayments(mode:)
Protocols/KinPaymentReadOperations.html#.abstract: Retrieves the last N KinPayments sent or received by the account and listens for future payments over time.

Protocols/KinPaymentReadOperations.html#.name: getPaymentsForTransactionHash(_:)
Protocols/KinPaymentReadOperations.html#.abstract: Retrieves the KinPayments that were processed in the referred KinTransaction

Protocols/KinAccountReadOperations.html#.name: observeBalance(mode:)
Protocols/KinAccountReadOperations.html#.abstract: Returns the current balance and listens to future account balance changes.

Protocols/KinAccountCreationApi.html.name: KinAccountCreationApi
Protocols/KinAccountCreationApi.html.abstract: An API for the SDK to delegate KinAccount registration with the Kin Blockchain to developers.

Protocols/KinAccountCreationApiV4.html.name: KinAccountCreationApiV4
Protocols/KinAccountCreationApiV4.html.abstract: An API for the SDK to delegate KinAccount registration with the Kin Blockchain to developers.

Protocols/KinTransactionWhitelistingApi..name: KinTransactionWhitelistingApi
Protocols/KinTransactionWhitelistingApi..abstract: An API for the SDK to delegate transaction whitelisting with the Kin Blockchain to developers.

Enums/ObservationMode.html#/s:7KinBase15.name: passive
Enums/ObservationMode.html#/s:7KinBase15.abstract: Updates are only based on local actions or via calling Observer.requestInvalidation

Enums/ObservationMode.html#/s:7KinBase15.name: active
Enums/ObservationMode.html#/s:7KinBase15.abstract: Updates are pushed from the network. Includes all .passive updates.

Enums/ObservationMode.html#/s:7KinBase15.name: activeNewOnly
Enums/ObservationMode.html#/s:7KinBase15.abstract: Exclusively new updates from actions taken after starting to listen to this Observer.

Enums/ObservationMode.html.name: ObservationMode
Enums/ObservationMode.html.abstract: Describes the mode by which updates are presented to an Observer

Classes/KinServiceV4/Errors.html#/s:7Kin.name: upgradeRequired
Classes/KinServiceV4/Errors.html#/s:7Kin.abstract: It is expected that this error is handled gracefully by notifying users

Classes/KinAccountContext/Builder.html#/.name: importExistingPrivateKey(_:)
Classes/KinAccountContext/Builder.html#/.abstract: Let’s you access the KinAccount from a private key

Classes/KinAccountContext/Builder.html.name: Builder
Classes/KinAccountContext/Builder.html.abstract: Provides different ways to build a KinAccountContext. Initialize the Builder with a KinEnvironment to start.

Classes/KinAccountContext.html#/s:7KinBa.name: service
Classes/KinAccountContext.html#/s:7KinBa.abstract: A service used to retrieve all account and payment data

Classes/KinAccountContext.html#/s:7KinBa.name: storage
Classes/KinAccountContext.html#/s:7KinBa.abstract: Stores all account and payment data. See KinFileStorage for provided implementation.

Classes/KinAccountContext.html.name: KinAccountContext
Classes/KinAccountContext.html.abstract: Instantiate a KinAccountContext to operate on a KinAccount when you have a private key.

Classes/NetworkOperationHandler.html.name: NetworkOperationHandler
Classes/NetworkOperationHandler.html.abstract: Handles queuing, retry, and backoff strategy of network operations.

Typealiases.html.abstract: The following type aliases are available globally.
